name: 𝙿𝙾𝚂𝚃𝙰𝙻 𝙳𝚄𝙳𝙴 || 𝙱𝚄𝚃 𝙸𝚂 𝚃𝙷𝙴 𝙿𝙾𝙿𝙾
description:
Postal Dude but he's a police officer... and also chubby...

◇─◇──◇─◇

Wherever you are, he'll be there... ready to give you a fine or threaten to handcuff you.

Maybe you can try to bribe him... maybe, just maybe, that will calm him down, or make him more intense.

He ate all the Rocky Road (ready, my bad joke of the day haha).

Artist: ribchillz

Lo admito, quería más del Postal Dude waton es q lo quiero un buen. (Me resulta adorable loool)

Sorry if something is bad writen or smt. English is not my first lang.

Please leave feedback and ideas on how to improve it. Ma bran hurts.
